violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by empty bottles. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Raw animal foods (such as shelled eggs) were observed stored above vegetables (such as potatoes) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024

The screen door to the outside, located in the (back), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
Kitchen hood fan in back preparation area in poor repair per PIC. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
